groups.title: Spring Festival
groups.desc:
Questions 11-18
Complete the table below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

table.title: Spring Festival
content: Buses run from the town centre every $14$ minutes

questions.title: Buses run from the town centre every 【   】 minutes

groups.desc:
Questions 19 and 20
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.title: In the Spring Festival competition, you can win

options.title: A
options.content: a family pass to 'Balloons Down Under'.

options.title: C
options.content: a flight in a hot air balloon.

questions.title: You can get an entry form for the competition from

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I have in this studio with me Mary Smith from York Town Tourism, who is here to tell us about some of the events happening in our state capital over the next three weeks at the Spring Festival.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: So, Mary, what can we expect to see?

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Well, being in York Town is such an exciting time.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: To kick off the Spring Festival, a vast firework will be displayed down by the lake, starting at 9 p.m. this Saturday, the 4th of September.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Over ten thousand fireworks will be set off.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: All are choreographed to music and broadcast simultaneously here on Radio Yorkee.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: You should get there early if you want to get close to the action.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: So, bring along a picnic and a blanket, as it could get chilly in the evening.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: One thing that attracts visitors to the festival from all over the country is the fantastic collection of flowers on show in Central Park throughout the festival.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Special buses will run daily from the town centre to the show at 20-minute intervals for those who prefer public transport.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: If you are interested in seeing the latest in cars, from the fastest to the most expensive, then head over to The Motor Show at the Exhibition Centre from the 10th to the 15th of September.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: It will be open daily from 9 a.m. until 10 p.m.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: So, you can even pop in there after work.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Do you like photography?

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Then go along to 'Grow Your Imagination', an exhibition of photographs of famous gardens, which will be held at the art gallery from the 11th to the 19th of September.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Come and be inspired by some of the world's most beautiful gardens.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: I have a sneak preview of some of the photographs, and they are magnificent.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: If music is more your thing, then you should come and hear the Australian Philharmonic Orchestra performing 'Swing in Spring' at the concert hall on Friday the 17th and Saturday the 18th of September.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: It's a celebration of dance music from the 1940s and 50s.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: There will be three performances.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Both evenings start at 7 p.m., and a matinee performance at 2.30 on Saturday.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: So, get your dancing shoes on and hit there.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: It's a guarantee to get your feet tapping.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Those are just a few of the attractions on offer.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: But for something a little different, you could try 'Balloons Down Under', which is the largest gathering of hot air balloons in the southern hemisphere.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: It's well worth it because over 25 balloons of all shapes and sizes will be a fantastic sight.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: I'm also happy to announce that one lucky person will get to go up in one of these free balloons.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: That is the prize in our unique Spring Festival competition.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: It usually costs you 200 dollars.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: So, it's not a bad prize.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: I'm sure you all want a chance to win, so you'll need to fill out the entry form in today's paper of the York Town News.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Don't forget to include your phone number and send it to Radio Yorkee.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Make sure your entry reaches us by 5 p.m. on Thursday, the 9th of September.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: Then to see if you've won, check out the festival's website on Saturday, the 11th of September, where we will publish the name of the lucky winner.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: It's such a fantastic prize.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: So, hurry up and get your entry in.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: So there you have it, just a few special events happening here in York Town over the Spring Festival.

transcript.speaker: Mary
transcript.en: And if you like any more details about ...

11.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 firework display，提示词为 location、near the，此处应填地点类名词或名词短语。
题目解析：定位词以 firework displayed 的形式出现，随后听到地点 lake，符合预判。

12.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 4 September 9 p.m.、blanket，提示词为 pack，此处应填物品类名词或名词短语。
题目解析：定位词以 9 p.m. this Saturday, the 4th of September 的形式出现，随后听到的一系列信息中均未出现预判类型内容，需继续往下听。听到 bring along，该词为 pack 的同义替换，其后的 picnic 符合预判，可以先填写下来。随后听到 blanket，也可进一步确认答案。

13.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 display，提示词为 event，此处应填表示展览的名词或名词短语。
题目解析：先出现 flowers 一词，符合预判，可以先填写下来。随后马上听到定位词 display 的同义替换词 show，可以进一步确认答案。

14.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 buses、minutes，提示词为 every、minutes，此处应填时间间隔类数字。
题目解析：定位词 buses 出现后，抓取数字类信息，听到 20-minute，符合预判，填写下来。

15.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 show，提示词为 event、show，此处应填表示展览的名词或名词短语。
题目解析：定位信息直接搭配答案词给出“The Motor Show”，较好定位，做错的原因通常是对该词不熟悉，不知道其有“汽车”的意思，或者是不会拼写。因此，平时要注意积累词汇。听力考试还考查过 motorist（驾驶者）一词。本题答案大小写形式均可得分。

16.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Grow Your Imagination；提示词为 location、in the，此处应填地点类名词或名词短语。
题目解析：听到 Grow Your Imagination 先出现，继而听到 gardens，乍一听似乎符合地点预期，但文中说的是 photographs of famous gardens，意为“著名园林的照片”，而非展览举办地。继续往下听，听到短语 be held at，意为“在……被举办”，其后搭配地点类信息 art gallery，art gallery 符合预判，填写下来。

17.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Swing in Spring，提示词为 location、in the，此处应填地点类名词或名词短语。
题目解析：定位词 Swing in Spring 先出现，随后马上听到符合预判的地点类信息 concert hall，填写下来。

18.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Saturday matinee，提示词为 at，因为地点问题前文已经提及，所以此处应填表示时间的数字。
题目解析：先出现符合预判的时间 7 p.m. 和 2.30，知道 matinee 一词意为“下午场”的同学可以判断出 2.30 是符合题干要求的正确答案。对于不认识这个词的同学来说，选择定位词 Saturday 和 matinee 附近出现的时间 2.30，同样可以填出正确答案。

19.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Spring Festival competition，条件为 win。
题目解析：先出现 A 选项的部分信息 Balloons Down Under，但是未出现其搭配信息 family pass，这属于信息缺失，故不能选。继续往下听，听到 C 选项出现：某人可以免费乘坐热气球。随后听到题干定位词 Spring Festival competition，以及 win 的同义替换词 prize，故可以确定其为正确答案。接下来出现 B 选项中的 200 dollars，但原文表达的不是获得 200 美元支票，而是这个热气球之旅本来要花 200 美元，这属于偷换概念。

20.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 entry form，提示词为 get an entry form。
题目解析：定位词以及条件 fill out the entry form 先出现，其后搭配出现的 paper of the York Town News 为 B 选项的同义替换，故 B 选项正确。随后听到 A 选项是“寄送申请表”之地，而不是题干说的“获取申请表”之地。最后听到 C 选项是“公布幸运获胜者”的媒介，同样不符合题干要求。
